overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark futuristic industrial facility with dramatic red emergency and cyan accent lighting. The player character moves through narrow corridors, passes through automatic doors into a high-tech server room, and enters a ventilation area with massive industrial fans. Cyberpunk 2077 game engine footage featuring Arasaka corporate branding and high-end ray-traced lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dimly lit corridor toward the automatic doors ahead

entered.detail: large industrial container with Arasaka corporate branding visible on the side
safety railing running along the left wall of the corridor
exposed pipes and conduits mounted on the left wall
glass double doors with metal frames marking the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow industrial corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. An Arasaka-branded container sits prominently to the right while exposed piping lines the left wall. The camera advances steadily toward automatic glass doors visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-tech server corridor with cyan overhead lighting

events.description: passing through automatic doors into brightly lit corridor with cyan ceiling panels and red accent lighting
entering server room corridor with transparent glass walls revealing rack-mounted computer equipment

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the newly entered corridor while observing the server racks visible behind glass walls

entered.detail: transparent glass panels revealing rows of server racks with blinking lights
grid of cyan-colored overhead lights illuminating the corridor
tall black server equipment visible through the transparent walls
white chevron arrows painted on the floor indicating direction

segments.scene_description: The environment transforms dramatically as the camera passes through automatic doors into a long corridor illuminated by cyan ceiling panels. Glass walls on both sides reveal rows of active server equipment, while white directional arrows mark the concrete floor. Red accent lighting runs along the walls contrasting with the cool overhead lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: ventilation room with large industrial fans

events.description: turning right into side corridor featuring massive ventilation fans and server cabinets
camera turns ninety degrees right and proceeds into the fan room

agents.ego_description: turning into the side area to inspect the large ventilation fans and server infrastructure

entered.detail: massive circular industrial fans with metal grilles spinning slowly
tall black server racks with glowing indicator lights
thick black cables running along the floor and walls
rectangular overhead light fixtures providing white illumination

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a narrower maintenance corridor dominated by massive spinning ventilation fans on the right wall and server cabinets on the left. Thick industrial cables snake across the concrete floor while overhead light panels provide bright white illumination. The camera moves steadily past the rotating fan blades toward a metal door at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic industrial facility that transforms from a red-lit emergency zone into a high-tech server hub and finally a mechanical ventilation area. It begins by advancing through a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting, passing an Arasaka-branded container and exposed piping toward distant automatic glass doors. As the camera passes through these doors, the environment shifts dramatically into a long hall illuminated by cyan ceiling panels and red wall accents, where glass walls reveal rows of active server equipment. The scene then turns right into a narrower maintenance corridor, transitioning from the cool glow of the server room to bright white overhead lighting. Finally, the camera moves steadily past massive spinning ventilation fans and thick industrial cables snaking across the floor toward a metal door at the far end.
